title: Town hall message
text: Ordinary families keep paying the price while party insiders in the capital protect the same failed system.

title: Education ad
text: Our schools need investment, not another round of slogans from consultants who never enter a classroom.

title: Border rally clip
text: The political class ignored this problem for years, and now local communities are left to deal with the consequences of illegal crossings.

title: Healthcare stump speech
text: People in this district deserve shorter waiting lists and a government that listens before lobbyists get their private meeting.

title: Budget response
text: This budget is another polished press event: plenty of applause for ministers, nothing serious for workers.

title: Unity speech
text: We can disagree on policy without treating opponents as enemies; what matters is rebuilding trust and turnout.
